channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【February 2026 Insiders (version 1.110)】2026 年 2 月 Insider（版本 1.110）
item.description: 【Learn what is new in the Visual Studio Code February 2026 Release (1.110). Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 2026 年 2 月版本 (1.110) 中的新增功能。阅读全文

item.title: 【Azure Developer CLI (azd): One command to swap Azure App Service slots】Azure 开发人员 CLI (azd)：交换 Azure 应用服务插槽的一条命令
item.description: 【Swap deployment slots from your terminal—azd already knows your app. Azure App Service deployment slots let you stage changes and swap them into production with zero downtime. With azd, you can】从您的终端交换部署槽 - azd 已经知道您的应用程序。 Azure 应用服务部署槽允许您暂存更改并将其交换到生产环境中，且停机时间为零。使用 azd，您可以

item.title: 【Just for fun: A survey of write protect notches on floppy disks and other media】只是为了好玩：软盘和其他介质上的写保护槽口的调查
item.description: 【As you may have noticed, sometimes I waste time】正如你可能已经注意到的，有时我浪费时间

item.title: 【What questions will you ask your data agent?】您会问您的数据代理哪些问题？
item.description: 【Since release 1.7, Data API builder (DAB) has had MCP support to securely provide agents access to your production data. To support small and massive databases, DAB consolidates operations into five, shared MCP tools that safely Create, Read, Update, and Delete. These are specifically designed to reduce token context window consumption.】自版本 1.7 以来，数据 API 构建器 (DAB) 已获得 MCP 支持，可以安全地为代理提供对生产数据的访问。为了支持小型和大型数据库，DAB 将操作整合到五个共享的 MCP 工具中，可以安全地创建、读取、更新和删除。这些是专门为减少令牌上下文窗口消耗而设计的。

item.title: 【What sort of horrible things happen if my dialog has a non-button with the control ID of IDCANCEL?】如果我的对话框有一个控件 ID 为 IDCANCEL 的非按钮，会发生什么可怕的事情？
item.description: 【I noted in the bonus chatter that if you have a control whose ID is IDCANCEL, it had better be a button if you know what's good for you. Shawn Keene doesn't know what's go】我在奖金闲谈中指出，如果您有一个 ID 为 IDCANCEL 的控件，那么如果您知道什么对您有好处，那么它最好是一个按钮。肖恩·基恩不知道发生了什么

item.title: 【The JavaScript AI Build-a-thon Season 2 starts today!】JavaScript AI 构建马拉松第二季今天开始！
item.description: 【Most applications used by millions of people every single day are powered by JavaScript/TypeScript. But when it comes to AI, most learning resources and code samples assume you're working in Python and will leave you trying to stitch scattered tutorials together to build AI into your stack. The JavaScript AI Build-a-thon 】每天有数百万人使用的大多数应用程序都是由 JavaScript/TypeScript 提供支持的。但当谈到人工智能时，大多数学习资源和代码示例都假设您正在使用 Python，并且会让您尝试将分散的教程拼接在一起，以将人工智能构建到您的堆栈中。 JavaScript AI 构建马拉松

item.title: 【Windows App Development CLI v0.2: .NET support, manifest placeholders, "winapp store" and more!】Windows 应用程序开发 CLI v0.2：.NET 支持、清单占位符、“winapp store”等等！
【GitHub Copilot Dev Days: Build faster with GitHub Copilot CLI, in VS Code & Visual Studio, and beyond!】GitHub Copilot 开发日：使用 GitHub Copilot CLI、VS Code 和 Visual Studio 等更快地构建！
item.description: 【Modern software development is moving fast—and AI is now a practical part of how Microsoft developers design, build, and ship applications e】现代软件开发正在快速发展，人工智能现在已成为 Microsoft 开发人员设计、构建和发布应用程序的实用部分。

item.title: 【Give Your Agents Domain Expertise with Agent Skills in Microsoft Agent Framework】通过 Microsoft Agent Framework 中的代理技能为您的代理提供领域专业知识
item.description: 【You can now equip your Microsoft Agent Framework agents with portable, reusable skill packages that provide domain expertise on demand — without changing a single line of your agent's core instructions. With the new FileAgentSkillsProvider, available for both .NET and Python, your agents can discover and load】现在，您可以为您的 Microsoft Agent Framework 代理配备可移植、可重用的技能包，这些技能包可按需提供领域专业知识，而无需更改代理的核心指令的一行。借助适用于 .NET 和 Python 的新 FileAgentSkillsProvider，您的代理可以发现并加载

item.title: 【Updates to Team Calendar extension】团队日历扩展更新
item.description: 【We are excited to release a new update to the Team Calendar extension. This update includes a series of visual refinements across the extension, introducing a more consistent design language, smoother transitions when expanding and collapsing】我们很高兴发布团队日历扩展的新更新。此更新包括整个扩展中的一系列视觉改进，引入了更一致的设计语言，展开和折叠时的过渡更平滑
